div.class: tw-w-full tw-max-w-[1200px] tw-mx-auto tw-px-4 md:tw-px-8 tw-mt-6 tw-mb-4 tw-flex tw-justify-start tw-relative tw-z-10
tw-bg-white tw-rounded-[12px] tw-px-5 tw-py-2.5 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-3 tw-shadow-sm tw-w-max tw-border tw-border-gray-100

a.class: tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-2 tw-text-gray-500 hover:tw-text-[#0f172a] tw-no-underline tw-transition-colors
tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[14px] tw-text-gray-500 hover:tw-text-[#0f172a] tw-no-underline tw-transition-colors

div.class: row o_wsale_products_main_row align-items-start flex-nowrap tw-w-full tw-max-w-[1200px] tw-mx-auto tw-m-0 tw-px-0 md:tw-px-4
tw-bg-white tw-rounded-[14px] tw-p-[24px] tw-w-full tw-shadow-sm tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-gray-200
tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-between tw-mb-8

button.class: tw-border tw-border-gray-300 tw-bg-transparent tw-px-4 tw-py-1.5 tw-rounded-full tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-text-[13px] tw-text-[#b3b3b3] hover:tw-text-black hover:tw-border-black tw-transition-colors tw-cursor-pointer

h6.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[15px] tw-text-[#4a4a4a] tw-mb-3 tw-text-left

div.class: tw-bg-[#fafafa] tw-p-[4px] tw-rounded-full tw-flex tw-items-center tw-w-full tw-min-h-[44px]

ut-pill ut-pill-inactive
ut-pill ut-pill-inactive

h6.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[15px] tw-text-[#4a4a4a] tw-mb-8 tw-text-left

div.class: tw-relative tw-w-full tw-mb-4

div.style: position:absolute; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); width:100%; height:10px; background:#f0f0f0; border-radius:999px; z-index:1; pointer-events:none;
position:absolute; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); height:10px; background:#d0d0d0; border-radius:999px; z-index:2; pointer-events:none; left:0%; right:0%;

div.class: tw-bg-black tw-text-white tw-px-3 tw-py-1 tw-rounded-full tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-bold tw-text-[11px]
div.style: position:absolute; top:100%; margin-top:4px; z-index:5; pointer-events:none; transform:translateX(-50%); left:0%;

div.class: tw-bg-black tw-text-white tw-px-3 tw-py-1 tw-rounded-full tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-bold tw-text-[11px]
div.style: position:absolute; bottom:100%; margin-bottom:4px; z-index:5; pointer-events:none; transform:translateX(-50%); left:100%;

input.style: position:absolute; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); width:100%; height:10px; -webkit-appearance:none; appearance:none; background:transparent; pointer-events:none; z-index:10; margin:0; outline:none;

position:absolute; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); width:100%; height:10px; -webkit-appearance:none; appearance:none; background:transparent; pointer-events:none; z-index:11; margin:0; outline:none;

oe_product tw-h-full
tw-w-full tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-pt-[80px] tw-pb-[120px]

p.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-bold tw-text-[#212529] tw-text-[18px] tw-opacity-68 tw-leading-[28px] tw-m-0

div.p: Sepertinya barang yang kamu cari tidak ada

p.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[#737373] tw-text-[16px] tw-opacity-68 tw-leading-[28px] tw-m-0

div.p: Coba gunakan kata kunci yang lain atau umum

div.class: products_pager d-flex justify-content-center pt-5 pb-3

form.class: card oe_product_cart h-100 d-flex tw-border-none tw-bg-transparent tw-shadow-none

t.t-value: keep(product.website_url, page=(pager['page']['num'] if pager['page']['num']>1 else None))

'tw-bg-white tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-gray-200 tw-rounded-[14px] tw-overflow-hidden tw-shadow-sm hover:tw-shadow-md hover:-tw-translate-y-1 tw-transition-all tw-duration-300 tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-h-full tw-no-underline tw-group'

div.class: o_wsale_product_btn d-none
